findings.description: Scheduled jobs fall back to insecure default token 'cleanup-secret' when CLEANUP_SECRET env var is not set. Any caller with knowledge of this default can trigger deletion of business listings.
findings.recommendation: Remove the fallback or fail loudly: `const expectedToken = import.meta.env.CLEANUP_SECRET; if (!expectedToken) throw new Error('CLEANUP_SECRET not configured');`

findings.description: Same insecure default token fallback issue as _cleanup-expired.ts. Mark-expired job could be triggered by anyone knowing the default.
findings.recommendation: Remove the fallback or fail loudly

findings.description: SKU limit error message displays same value twice: `${info.skuLimit}/${info.skuLimit}` instead of `${info.skuCount}/${info.skuLimit}`
Non-profit listings get status='live' but spec AC-US2-01 says 'published'. Verify 'live' and 'published' are equivalent in this codebase (check businessPages schema default vs. code value).
findings.recommendation: Verify status naming consistency across codebase. If 'live' = 'published', add a comment. If different, change to 'published'.

findings.description: Grace period check uses expiryDate but doesn't handle the case where expiryDate might be 0 or null. The condition `now > new Date((business.expiryDate || 0) * 1000)` could produce unexpected results.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit null check: `business.expiryDate &&` before the comparison

findings.description: getSubscriptionInfo() makes 2 separate DB queries per call. This function is called by canCreateSku(), canEditBusiness(), isInGracePeriod(), and getGracePeriodDaysRemaining() - potentially 8+ queries per page load.
findings.recommendation: Consider caching subscription info in memory for the request duration, or create a single query that returns all needed fields.

findings.description: Cleanup job queries SKU count before deletion, which is wasteful since the SKUs will be deleted anyway. The count is only used for logging.
findings.recommendation: Log 'X SKUs' before deletion using a subquery, or log `results.totalSkusDeleted += affectedRows` after deletion if supported by the driver.

findings.description: Dead code: `.replace('basic', 'basic')` and similar redundant replacements do nothing. The planType is already lowercase from the form select values.
findings.recommendation: Remove redundant replace calls. Only keep: `const planType = order.planType.replace('-yearly', '').replace('-monthly', '');`

findings.description: Grace period check runs on every SSR page load. For published business pages that are not in grace period, this is wasted computation on every visitor.
findings.recommendation: Consider moving grace period check to client-side only when subscriptionStatus !== 'active', or add CDN edge caching with grace period check bypass.
